assertionResults.title: Aptos wallet selector opens
assertionResults.passFailRationale: PASS: Clicking navbar Connect opened the wallet selector modal and the modal visibly contained Aptos wallet options (Petra, Nightly, Backpack), social login buttons (Continue with Google, Continue with Apple), and chain tabs (Aptos, Solana, Ethereum).

interactiveSteps.expected: Trading page loads with navbar Connect button
interactiveSteps.observed: Page loaded and navbar button labeled 'Connect' was present (snapshot ref @e8).
Visible as links: 'Petra Petra Install', 'Nightly Nightly Install', 'Backpack Backpack Install'.

interactiveSteps.expected: Google and Apple options are visible
interactiveSteps.observed: Visible buttons: 'Continue with Google' and 'Continue with Apple'.

interactiveSteps.expected: Aptos, Solana, Ethereum tabs are visible

interactiveSteps.observed: Saved standard and annotated screenshots in mission evidence directory.

consoleErrors.agentBrowserErrors: Failed to fetch (3 occurrences) observed after flow.
consoleErrors.consoleCheck: Non-blocking pre-existing runtime noise observed (e.g., font decode warnings, CORS/403 errors from external quote/metrics endpoints, cash-ws handshake failures). None prevented the Connect modal from opening or showing required options.

network.notes: agent-browser network capture is metadata-only (method+URL); status codes validated via in-page fetch() probes.

interactiveSteps: Checked console errors and network activity

frictions.description: Console output is noisy with pre-existing warnings/errors (font decode, RPC 403/CORS, websocket handshake) during page load.
frictions.resolution: Focused validation on required INT-002 modal UI elements and corroborated with screenshot + element snapshot evidence.

summary: Tested 1 assertion (INT-002): pass. Required wallet modal elements and chain tabs are present after clicking Connect in navbar; evidence captured.
